name: chaos-substrate
description: Agent guidance, MCP tools, and wrappers for indexing projects, querying code memory, and generating feature-context explanations.

interface.shortDescription: Index projects, query code memory, and explain features.
interface.longDescription: Agent workflow, MCP tools, and helper commands for initializing, updating, querying, building feature context, and generating feature-memory websites with the Rust-only Chaos Substrate code knowledge memory.
defaultPrompt: Index this project with Chaos Substrate.
Explain this feature with Chaos Substrate.
Find implementation context for this feature.
